description_long: This is a modern, geometric-patterned cabinet or shelving unit featuring a combination of closed storage and open shelving. The left section consists of a tall cabinet with horizontal wood grain and a vertical handle, while the right section has a lower cabinet with a striking black and tan triangular pattern and a horizontal handle. Above the lower cabinet, there are two open shelves, one of which displays a decorative circular object, and the top shelf is empty. The back and side panels are solid black, providing a bold contrast to the patterned fronts. The rightmost side of the unit is slightly recessed, creating a stepped profile. The overall design is contemporary, with a focus on visual texture and functional storage.
description: A modern cabinet with geometric wood patterns, open shelving, and a stepped profile, featuring both closed and open storage spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the patterned cabinet doors, open shelves with decorative items, and both vertical and horizontal handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and solid black side panel, with handles and shelf edges visible.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate side view highlighting the striped back panel and open shelving, with less detail on the cabinet doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a solid black panel, with minimal visible features except the top shelf edge.
